entity.label: Shaashgaz
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Servant of the beautiful, a chief eunuch in the second house of the harem of king Ahasuerus (Esther 2:14).

nodes.label: Shaashgaz
nodes.description: Servant of the beautiful, a chief eunuch in the second house of the harem of king Ahasuerus (Esther 2:14).

verses.text: In the evening she went, and on the morrow she returned into the second house of the women, to the custody of Shaashgaz, the king’s chamberlain, which kept the concubines: she came in unto the king no more, except the king delighted in her, and that she were called by name.
